message:
feat(tui,analysis): rustfmt struct literals, deduplicate file relations, fix zero-limit recipe emit

Apply rustfmt to all CommandHint struct literals and multi-line closures
in tui.rs, expanding compact initializers to multi-line form for
consistent style across all view mode footer hints.

Deduplicate repeated file paths within a single commit when computing
file relations in file_intel.rs by collecting into a BTreeSet before
aggregating co-change counts. Add regression test confirming dedup.

Fix emit_script to treat limit=0 as "include no recommendations"
instead of the previous behavior where 0 was indistinguishable from
unlimited. Add test for the zero-limit edge case.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
